title: HYSA Bonus Offer
prompt: Your bank offers a small HYSA bonus if you keep saving steadily. What do you do?

choices.label: Add $10 to savings
Wait until next month
Cut a want and move $10 to savings

title: Streaming Bill Hits
prompt: A subscription renewal posts sooner than you expected. What do you do?

choices.label: Keep it and cover the bill
Cancel and protect your budget
Pull from savings to cover it

title: Textbook Fee
prompt: A class fee or textbook cost comes up. What do you do?

choices.label: Pay it now
Ask about a simple payment plan
Delay it and hope nothing happens

title: Bank Fee Notice
prompt: Your bank posts a small service fee. What do you do?

choices.label: Cover it and adjust your budget
Ignore it and move on
Call to ask if the fee can be waived

title: Cash Envelope Challenge
prompt: You want better control over your wants this month. What do you do?

choices.label: Set a small cash limit for wants
Keep spending the usual way
Set a smaller partial limit

title: Reinvest Decision
prompt: A small amount is available to reinvest. Where should the money come from?

choices.label: Take it from checking and invest it
Cut wants and invest the difference
Skip reinvesting this time

title: CD Lock-In
prompt: A CD option offers stronger growth if you can leave the money alone. What do you do?

choices.label: Open the CD with $20
Keep the money in flexible savings
Keep the money in checking for now

title: Bill Reminder Alert
prompt: You get an alert that a payment is due tomorrow. What do you do?

choices.label: Pay it today
Move money from savings and pay it
Wait and risk the due date

title: Cash Gift Split
prompt: You get a small cash gift. What do you do?

choices.label: Save all of it
Split it between checking, savings, and fun
Spend it all now

title: Build an Overdraft Buffer
prompt: Your checking is getting thin. What do you do?

choices.label: Move $15 into checking as a buffer
Leave it as is
Cut wants and leave the money in checking

title: Card Purchase Decision
prompt: A purchase would be easier on your card, but your balance matters. What do you do?

choices.label: Use the card only if you can cover it
Use the card because it is convenient
Wait until you have cash ready

title: Auto-Save Toggle
prompt: Your bank offers automatic saving each month. What do you do?

choices.label: Turn it on
Turn on a smaller amount
Leave it off for now

title: Lunch Budget Plan
prompt: You want to avoid random lunch spending this month. What do you do?

choices.label: Make a simple lunch plan
Wing it day by day
Set a tiny snack budget only

title: Emergency Jar
prompt: You want a little backup for surprises. What do you do?

choices.label: Start an emergency jar with $10
Wait until you have more money
Use gift or bonus money to start it
choices.ledger_note: Started emergency jar with bonus money

title: Loan Payment Due
prompt: A payment is due on something you financed. What do you do?

choices.label: Pay it on time
Pay part now and plan the rest
Miss the payment

title: Unexpected Car Cost
prompt: Transportation or car-related costs rise this month. What do you do?

choices.label: Adjust your budget to cover it
Use savings to protect the month
Delay another bill to cover it
choices.ledger_note: Delayed another bill to cover transport

title: Apartment Deposit Target
prompt: You want to be ready for a housing deposit later. What do you do?

choices.label: Save toward the target now
Save a smaller amount
Skip it this month

title: Investment Mix Choice
prompt: You have a little money set aside. What do you do with it?

choices.label: Choose a safer mix
Choose a balanced mix
Choose a riskier mix

title: Fee Reversal Chance
prompt: You may be able to get a fee reversed if you ask. What do you do?

choices.label: Ask respectfully for a reversal
Just pay it and move on
Ignore the notice for now

title: Micro-Budget Week
prompt: Money is tight this week. What do you do?

choices.label: Make a tight spending plan
Just guess your way through the week
Pause fun spending until next check

title: Savings Goal Tracker
prompt: You can update your savings goal tracker today. What do you do?

choices.label: Update it and stay focused
Ignore it this month
Raise the goal and challenge yourself

title: Babysitting: Work Supplies Decision

choices.label: Buy the basic supplies you need
